artifacts.description: Fresh-install first onboarding page before tapping any visible primary action.
artifacts.alt: Pod0 first onboarding screen with headline, subtitle, three feature chips, page dots, and Get Started button.
artifacts.caption: Visible first-run onboarding page is present and visually clean.

artifacts.description: XcodeBuildMCP semantic UI-tree excerpt showing onboarding controls plus hidden main-shell targets.
Tail of the XcodeBuildMCP build/run log proving the retry build succeeded after Tuist and Rust prerequisites.
XcodeBuildMCP launch console log for io.f7z.podcast on the dedicated simulator.
Runtime OSLog stream captured by XcodeBuildMCP for the fresh-install run.

run.live_dependency_rationale: FND-001 used no provider, relay, STT, TTS, or LLM dependency.

attempts.notes: Initial build failed because Derived/Sources/TuistAssets+Podcastr.swift and TuistBundle+Podcastr.swift were missing in the fresh worktree.

The second build/run hit the MCP 300s timeout, but the app installed and launched. Screenshot showed onboarding; UI tree exposed hidden main-shell controls behind onboarding. Hidden Settings tap probe returned SUCCEEDED but did not navigate.

branch_coverage.trigger: Erase dedicated simulator and launch without --UITestSeed.
branch_coverage.expected: First onboarding page appears before primary action.

branch_coverage.trigger: Capture semantic UI tree on first onboarding page.
branch_coverage.expected: No main-shell controls are exposed behind onboarding.

execution.retry_policy: Fix #743, then re-run FND-001 from an erased simulator and capture launch metric, screenshot, UI tree, and logs.

verdict.summary: FND-001 fails the semantic first-run gate: the visible onboarding page appears, but the UI tree exposes hidden main-shell controls behind it.
verdict.score_gate_explanation: The screenshot satisfies the first-page visual requirement, but the required UI-tree gate is contradicted by hidden Home/Add Show/Search/Settings/Agent targets.

attempted_test.summary: Executed FND-001 on an erased dedicated iPhone 17 simulator with no --UITestSeed argument. Captured first page screenshot, UI tree, build log, launch log, and OSLog.

actual_result.summary: The visible first onboarding page appears. The UI tree also exposes hidden main-shell text and targets including Home, Add Show, Search, Open Agent, Settings, and Start voice conversation.

artifacts.summary: Attached a current screenshot, semantic UI-tree excerpt, build/run log tail, launch console log, and runtime OSLog.

review_skill_grounding.summary: This review used the requested skills search and grounded critique in vabole/apple-skills@ios-liquid-glass, vabole/apple-skills@hig, and qodex-ai/ai-agent-skills@mobile-app-interface.
notes: npx skills search "iOS mobile UI UX liquid glass native polish validation" returned ios-liquid-glass and mobile-app-interface among the selected results.
Applied Liquid Glass guidance: glass belongs on controls/chrome, not dense hidden content; accessibility settings must remain legible.
Applied HIG/mobile guidance: safe areas, Dynamic Type, 44x44 pt controls, semantic labels, and onboarding should be brief and not expose contradictory app state.

ui_polish_report.summary: The visible first page is well composed in light mode: centered icon, clear headline, readable copy, restrained feature chips, progress dots, and a bottom Get Started control above the home indicator.

ux_polish_report.summary: The visible UX gives a clear first action, but the semantic tree contradicts the first-run gate by leaking main-shell actions behind onboarding.

performance_metrics.summary: Cold launch to first onboarding frame was not measured. The MCP build/run retry timed out at 300s even though the app later launched, so no defensible launch-to-first-frame metric is attached.

accessibility_dynamic_type.summary: The captured accessibility tree exposes the visible Get Started button and onboarding text, but also exposes hidden main-shell controls. Dynamic Type, VoiceOver traversal, contrast, Reduce Motion, and Reduce Transparency were not fully audited.

liquid_glass_ios_primitives.summary: Visible glass-like treatment is restrained to the app icon/feature chips/CTA chrome and preserves contrast in light mode. Hidden shell exposure prevents a clean pass.

defects_issues_filed.summary: Filed #743 for the hidden main-shell semantic exposure behind onboarding.

verdict.summary: Fail for FND-001 until #743 is fixed and the semantic UI tree proves no main-shell controls are exposed behind first-run onboarding.

actual_result.rationale: The first page appears visually, but the semantic gate fails because hidden main-shell controls are present in the UI tree.

artifacts.rationale: Screenshot, UI tree, build/log references are attached; launch metric and full accessibility audit are missing.

ui_polish.rationale: Visible first page is visually coherent in light mode, but hidden shell semantics block a clean UI pass.

ux_polish.rationale: A first-run gate cannot expose underlying app actions to automation/accessibility before onboarding completion.

performance.rationale: The required cold-launch metric was not captured because the MCP build/run call timed out at 300s.

accessibility_dynamic_type.rationale: Hidden main-shell controls remain in the accessibility/automation tree behind onboarding.

liquid_glass_ios_primitives.rationale: Visible glass-like chrome is restrained and readable in light mode; Reduce Transparency and dark mode were not audited.

defects_issues_filed.rationale: The actionable FND-001 defect is filed as #743 with evidence paths.

evidence_confidence.rationale: Artifacts are current and tied to source commit/device/tooling; timing evidence remains blocked.

verdict.rationale: FND-001 cannot pass while the semantic UI tree exposes hidden main-shell controls.

metrics.name: Cold launch to first onboarding frame
metrics.method: Required launch timestamp was unavailable because build_run_sim timed out at 300s after the app had built/launched.

instrumentation_gaps.summary: No defensible launch-to-first-frame metric was captured due to MCP build_run_sim timeout.
VoiceOver traversal, Dynamic Type, dark mode, Reduce Motion, and Reduce Transparency were not fully audited.

missing.reason: Cold launch to first onboarding frame is not measured.
VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, contrast, Reduce Motion, and Reduce Transparency were not audited.

evidence.redaction_summary: Fresh-install screenshots, UI tree, and logs contain no private account, key, provider token, feed, transcript, or audio material.

issues.title: FND-001: first onboarding page exposes hidden main-shell controls in UI tree

next_actions.title: Hide or unmount main-shell accessibility/hit-test targets while onboarding is presented.
Re-run FND-001 from erased simulator and capture screenshot, UI tree, logs, and cold-launch metric.
